title: Property Consultant - Man Infraconstruction - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Man Infraconstruction - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Man Infraconstruction, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
